tags.fixme: I am not sure if it is this peak or another closer to the cave on this mountain
tags.name: เขาปลาร้า
เขาฆ้องชัย

tags.description:en: It is quite high and steep, formed by rocks of different heights situated one behind another to the top. Surrounding the mountain, there are about 30 small and large caves, such as Tham Prathun, Tham Bandai, Tham Ang, Tham Buddha Prawat (Lord Buddha’s Bio
tags.name: เขาปฐวี
